---
title: "Cartographie Eoliennes"
---

C'est ici que devrait venir un text un peu cool :) 

```{r, echo=FALSE,include=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(sp)



load("wd.RData")



```

<style>
.html-widget {
    margin: auto;
}
</style>

```{r, echo=FALSE}

icon_eol  <- makeAwesomeIcon(icon = 'bolt', markerColor = 'orange', library='fa', iconColor = 'black')

# make leaflet map with municipalities
leaflet(width = "100%",options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,maxZoom = 25)) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender("function(el, x) {
        L.control.zoom({ position: 'bottomleft' }).addTo(this)
    }") %>%
  setView(lng = long_center, lat = lat_center, zoom = 12)%>%
  addTiles(group = "OSM") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$"Esri.WorldImagery",group = "ESRI")%>%
  addPolygons(data = muns,
              fill =  "rose", weight=1,col = "yellow",
              fillColor = c("orange","green","blue"),fillOpacity = 0.2,
              highlightOptions = highlightOptions(color='grey',weight=3,bringToFront = TRUE),
              group = "Communes") %>%
     addPolygons(data = buf_4,
              fill =  "rose", weight=1,col = "yellow",
              fillColor = c("orange","green","blue"),fillOpacity = 0.2,
              highlightOptions = highlightOptions(color='grey',weight=3,bringToFront = TRUE),
              group = "Buffer 400m") %>%

    addAwesomeMarkers(lng = eols$long, lat = eols$lat, label = eols$label,group = "Eoliennes",icon = icon_eol)%>%
    addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("OSM","ESRI"),
    overlayGroups = c("Eoliennes","Communes","Buffer 400m"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE),
    position = "topright"
  )

```
